description: CRAWLTOLL is a 3-line Express/Connect middleware that places an x402 paywall in front of AI crawlers. Bot and agent traffic hits HTTP 402 with machine-readable payment terms (USDC on Base). The agent sends an X-PAYMENT header; CRAWLTOLL verifies and settles via the x402 facilitator; content unlocks instantly. Human visitors always browse for free. AP2-native: verifies Google Agent Payments Protocol mandates before honoring payment.

ap2_support.description: AP2-native — verifies Google Agent Payments Protocol (A2A x402 extension) mandates before honoring payment
ap2_support.signature_algorithm: ECDSA P-256 / SHA-256 over JCS-canonicalized claims (RFC 8785)

payment.settlement: via x402 facilitator — instant unlock after payment verification

config_options.payTo: Your USDC wallet address on Base — required
config_options.freePaths: Paths always open (default: discovery files like llms.txt, agents.json)
config_options.chargeHumans: false (default) — flip to gate all traffic including humans
config_options.ap2TrustedIssuers: Map of DID key IDs to PEM public keys for AP2 mandate verification

generated_files.llms.txt: LLM discovery file — describes paywall policy to AI models
generated_files.agents.json: Agent card — machine-readable pricing and payment terms
generated_files.robots.txt additions: robots.txt entries pointing bots to payment info

revenue_tracking: Built-in ledger. View with npx crawltoll stats.
use_cases: Monetize AI scrapers crawling your documentation, API references, or premium content
Gate news archives, research databases, or paywalled content from AI training data harvesters
Compliance layer ensuring only AP2-authorized agents access sensitive resources
compatibility: Express, Connect, and any Node.js HTTP framework supporting middleware

ecosystem.description: ScriptMasterLabs builds x402 micropayment infrastructure, AI agent trust systems, and institutional market intelligence tools. All products interoperate via the x402 protocol for agent-native payments.
